'''Beme''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and recruiter for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="XWOSG" />

Part of an Alliance team accompanying [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Captain Beme encountered [[Agamar Resistance]] member [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], who hoped to join the Rebel Alliance and enroll in the [[Alliance Starfighter Corps/Legends|Alliance Starfighter Corps]]. Beme doubted Farlander's suitability as a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], offering him positions in maintenance, [[Logistics and Supply Corps/Legends|Logistics]], or [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]], before eventually admitting the young rebel to the Alliance's [[Starfighter Training Program]] on the condition that Farlander would shoot down a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] for him. Wishing him good luck and advising him not to be [[Death/Legends|killed]] on his first mission, Beme instated Farlander as a [[Flight Cadet|flight cadet]] aboard the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']].<ref name="XWOSG" />
